title: Sushi Delivery Co.
description:
Sushi Delivery Co. is a cozy, stylish, Tokyo‑inspired delivery adventure where you run a tiny sushi courier service in a connected three‑street micro‑neighborhood. Hop into your electric kei-car, take orders, weave through alleys, and deliver fresh sushi before it gets cold — all while soaking in ambient lights, warm storefronts, and a calm rainy city atmosphere.

Features: A Tiny World With Big PersonalityExplore a handcrafted 3‑street district filled with ramen shops, vending machines, lantern alleys, and cozy storefronts. Every corner feels alive.

 Deliver Sushi, Earn Tips, Upgrade Your RideComplete delivery runs, earn yen, and improve your delivery flow. Faster routes, smoother handling, and better efficiency mean happier customers.

 In‑Car Radio With 3 Chill ChannelsCruise with lo‑fi beats, Japanese ambience, or classical melodies. The radio remembers your last station automatically.

 A Relaxing, Atmospheric ExperienceNo combat. No stress. Just vibes. Drive, deliver, and enjoy the soft glow of a quiet Tokyo‑inspired day.

 Clean, Cozy Visual StyleA minimalist aesthetic with warm lighting, soft colors, and a calm mood. Designed to feel like a midday walk through your favorite neighborhood.

Simple Controls, Smooth DrivingEasy to pick up, satisfying to master. Perfect for short sessions or long chill nights.

CONTROLS:WASD (Keyboard) or LT/RT/LS (Controller): Drive

E (Keyboard) or X (Controller): Interact/Pickup/Deliver Sushi

Enter (Keyboard) or Y (Controller): Enter Shop

Music Note Button or B (Controller): Change Radio Track.
description_short: A cozy delivery micro‑game where you navigate a tiny Japanese neighborhood in your Kei‑car, bringing sushi to customers while soaking in soft lights, calm music, and rainy city ambience.
